title: Keeper
description: Replacing beehives and nests with Keeper creature
body:
🍯 Replacing beehives and nests with Keeper creature

![keeper](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81fe105de9819e041ab859310f8b67d5100c4a12.png)
# 
**Changes:**
- 🎨 Beehive and nest texture
- ✨ Adds animations
- 🎵 New _Keeper_ sounds 
# 
🐝**Keeper** living in symbiotic relationship with bees... but often honey hurt **keepers** so its your duty to clean them. be careful nobody knows if they bite
